fields.strategyNotes: Correct = the score the offline-validated model would give, delivered in budget, with every referral auditable. Out of scope: re-validating model science (done in PoC). Acceptance thresholds per row below.

rows.scope: Holdout year + storm-event slice; parity with offline scores
Contract tests: ClaimCenter events, SIU webhook, DWH sync
10x FNOL rate replay; p99 < 2 s sustained
Prompt injection via narratives; exfiltration; IDOR on score API
